Reentrancy in aNewHope._transfer(address,address,uint256) (aNewHope.sol#471-533):

		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (aNewHope.sol#547-559)
	External calls sending eth:

		- _feeAddrWallet1.transfer(amount.div(2)) (aNewHope.sol#567)
		- _feeAddrWallet2.transfer(amount.div(2)) (aNewHope.sol#569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (aNewHope.sol#531)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (aNewHope.sol#655)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (aNewHope.sol#635)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (aNewHope.sol#637)
	aNewHope._rOwned (aNewHope.sol#269) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- aNewHope._takeTeam(uint256) (aNewHope.sol#649-657)
	- aNewHope._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (aNewHope.sol#631-645)
	- aNewHope.balanceOf(address) (aNewHope.sol#389-393)
	- aNewHope.constructor() (aNewHope.sol#335-353)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (aNewHope.sol#531)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (aNewHope.sol#663)
	aNewHope._rTotal (aNewHope.sol#285) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- aNewHope._getCurrentSupply() (aNewHope.sol#755-765)
	- aNewHope._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (aNewHope.sol#661-667)
	- aNewHope.constructor() (aNewHope.sol#335-353)
	- aNewHope.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (aNewHope.sol#445-453)
